fields.label: Personal Access Token
fields.helpText: Generate at GitLab > Settings > Access Tokens with api scope

healthcheck_config.description: Validates PAT via GitLab user endpoint

metadata.summary: GitLab for repositories, CI/CD pipelines, issues, and merge requests.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to GitLab > User Settings > Access Tokens
2. Click 'Add new token', set a name and expiration
3. Select the 'api' scope for full API access
4. Click 'Create personal access token' and copy the glpat-... value
